metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the spec-loop plugin — a spec-driven autonomous development loop for Claude Code. Offers a stable channel, beta/alpha pre-release channels, and a pinned archive of previous releases.

plugins.name: spec-loop
plugins.description: STABLE channel — the recommended build. Spec-driven autonomous loop: decompose one request into small targeted slices, then plan→execute→review→fix each in parallel git worktrees, surfacing to the human only on genuine ambiguity, material assumptions, or unfixable review blocks.

plugins.name: spec-loop-beta
plugins.description: BETA channel — release candidates ahead of stable. Tracks the `beta` branch.

plugins.name: spec-loop-alpha
plugins.description: ALPHA channel — bleeding edge, may be unstable. Tracks the `alpha` branch.

plugins.name: spec-loop-0-4-0
plugins.description: ARCHIVE — spec-loop v0.4.0 (dynamic decomposition + integration gate), pinned. Install to roll back to this exact release.

plugins.name: spec-loop-0-3-0
plugins.description: ARCHIVE — spec-loop v0.3.0 (The Iron Council), pinned. Install to roll back to this exact release.

plugins.name: spec-loop-0-2-0
plugins.description: ARCHIVE — spec-loop v0.2.0 (post-review code-quality gate), pinned. Install to roll back to this exact release.
